= Contents =
  - [[#postgress|postgress]]
    - [[#postgress#pgcli connect|pgcli connect]]
  - [[#sql|sql]]
    - [[#sql#value modification|value modification]]
      - [[#sql#value modification#insert values|insert values]]
      - [[#sql#value modification#update part of the value|update part of the value]]
      - [[#sql#value modification#delete values|delete values]]
    - [[#sql#table modification|table modification]]
      - [[#sql#table modification#add column|add column]]
      - [[#sql#table modification#rename column|rename column]]
    - [[#sql#queries|queries]]
      - [[#sql#queries#filter values|filter values]]
      - [[#sql#queries#limit query|limit query]]
      - [[#sql#queries#sort order|sort order]]

= postgress =

== pgcli connect ==
{{{
  pgcli -h localhost -u postgres
}}}
 
= sql =

== value modification ==
=== insert values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
   INSERT INTO table (col1, col2) VALUES (val1, val2);
}}}
=== update part of the value ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  UPDATE table SET value = REPLACE(value, 'which', 'whith') WHERE condition;
}}}
=== delete values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  DELETE FROM table WHERE condition;
}}}

== table modification ==
=== add column ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  ALTER TABLE table ADD column_name datatype; 
}}}
=== rename column ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  ALTER TABLE table RENAME COLUMN column_name TO column_new_name; 
}}}

== queries ==
=== filter values ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table WHERE string IN (value1, value2,...);
}}}
=== limit query ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table LIMIT num;
}}}
=== sort order ===
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table ORDER BY id asc/desc;
}}}
